title: The metabolic geometry of severe human neutrophils: redox-carbon state separation and the limits of inferring effector function - analysis code and derived data
description: SCIENTIFIC SUPERSESSION NOTICE (2026-07-19): cross-pair ordering and Control-Severe dominance claims withdrawn pending independent metric audit. Repository history preserved. See NOTICE_SCIENTIFIC_SUPERSESSION_2026-07-19.md. Reproducible code, derived data and figures for the Hypothesis and Theory manuscript on the severity-associated metabolic state of human neutrophils and the identifiability limits of NET-burden readouts. Public datasets only; derived outputs only. No biological-parameter, flux, NETosis, enzyme-activity, executed-function or clinical claim.
notes: Status: scientifically superseded in part. Public correction date: 2026-07-19. Independent metric audit: pending. Original files preserved for traceability.
